free_text: Angular distribution of elastically and inelastically
Heavy ice bombarded by deuterons of 150keV energy
filled with 5 atm. of hydrogen, 5 atm. of argon.
Dif. angl. inl. par. c-s in arb.units
- for Cu for level 1.0 MeV at angles 90, 105, 135 deg,
- for Pb for 0.8 MeV level at angles 90, 135 deg
are presented on Fig.10 of J,SJA,3,(6),1379,1957 .
Total inl. c-s calculated as difference between
total c-s of Sal'nikov and measured elastic c-s
are given in Table 3 of J,SJA,3,(6),1379,1957 .
In many Subents SF4-subfield was added
to the reaction code for 'EL' in SF3, STATUS
code in all Subents corrected, some data
data of SAN 020 transferred in SAN 015
and INSTITUTE code corrected from CCP to FEI
Ref. of Engl. translation was added.
